title: Los últimos de Filipinas
writer: Antonio Román, Pedro de Juan, Enrique Alfonso Barcones
actors: Armando Calvo, José Nieto, Guillermo Marín
plot: During the time of the Spanish-American War, the commandant of a Spanish detachment in Baler, in the Philippines, realizes that the native people of his district are planning an insurrection. He orders his troops to entrench in th...
